title: New Wave Vodka Product Knowledge
summary: Overview of New Wave Vodka, its flavour profile and market positioning.
purpose: To equip staff with product knowledge for production, sales and customer interactions.
safety_notes: Responsible service of alcohol principles apply.

steps.title: Understand Product Positioning
steps.body: New Wave Vodka is positioned as a modern, approachable vodka designed for contemporary consumers.

steps.title: Learn Key Characteristics
steps.body: The product emphasises smoothness, purity and versatility.

steps.title: Understand the Brand Philosophy
steps.body: The New Wave range focuses on bringing more consumers into the spirits category through approachable flavour and modern branding.

steps.title: Know Recommended Serves
steps.body: Suitable for soda serves, cocktails and mixed drinks.

steps.title: Understand Storage Requirements
steps.body: Store upright in a cool, dry location away from direct sunlight.

risks.prevention: Use approved product descriptions and tasting notes.

troubleshooting: Refer to current sales and marketing resources for updated positioning.

title: RTD Portfolio Overview
summary: Introduction to Via Nova ready-to-drink products.
purpose: To provide staff with an understanding of the RTD product range.
safety_notes: Responsible service of alcohol principles apply.

steps.title: Understand the Category
steps.body: RTDs combine spirits with mixers in a convenient ready-to-consume format.

steps.title: Learn the Product Range
steps.body: Become familiar with all current RTD products and flavours.

steps.title: Understand Target Consumers
steps.body: RTDs appeal to consumers seeking convenience and consistent quality.

steps.title: Understand Packaging Formats
steps.body: Products may be supplied in cans and multi-pack configurations.

steps.title: Know Storage Requirements
steps.body: Store in cool, dry conditions away from direct sunlight.

risks.prevention: Understand the flavour profile of each SKU.

troubleshooting: Review current product specifications and sales materials.

title: Botanical Selection Principles
summary: Guidance on the selection and use of botanicals in spirit production.
purpose: To provide staff with an understanding of botanical contribution to flavour.
safety_notes: Follow approved handling procedures for all botanicals.

steps.title: Understand Botanical Function
steps.body: Botanicals contribute aroma, flavour and complexity to spirits.

steps.title: Recognise Core Gin Botanicals
steps.body: Juniper typically provides the foundational gin character.

steps.title: Understand Supporting Botanicals
steps.body: Citrus, spice, floral and root botanicals contribute balance and complexity.

steps.title: Evaluate Quality
steps.body: Botanicals should be fresh, aromatic and sourced from approved suppliers.

steps.title: Maintain Consistency
steps.body: Use approved recipes and supplier specifications.

risks.prevention: Source from approved suppliers and inspect deliveries.

troubleshooting: Escalate unusual aroma or quality concerns before production.

title: Via Nova Distillation Philosophy
summary: Overview of Via Nova's approach to spirit production.
purpose: To communicate the principles underpinning Via Nova products.

steps.title: Prioritise Flavour
steps.body: Production decisions should support flavour quality and consistency.

steps.title: Pursue Efficiency
steps.body: Processes are designed to reduce waste and improve operational efficiency.

steps.title: Support Innovation
steps.body: Via Nova continually evaluates new methods and technologies.

steps.title: Maintain Compliance
steps.body: Innovation must always operate within regulatory requirements.

steps.title: Focus on Consistency
steps.body: Every batch should meet approved quality standards.

troubleshooting: Refer operational issues to production management.

title: Product Storage Requirements
summary: Storage requirements for finished spirit products.
purpose: To protect product quality throughout its life cycle.
safety_notes: Observe warehouse and manual handling procedures.

steps.title: Store Upright
steps.body: Keep bottles and cans upright wherever practical.

steps.title: Avoid Direct Sunlight
steps.body: Protect products from prolonged UV exposure.

steps.title: Maintain Stable Conditions
steps.body: Avoid extreme temperature fluctuations.

steps.title: Protect Packaging
steps.body: Prevent damage to labels, cartons and closures.

steps.title: Follow FIFO
steps.body: Rotate stock using first-in-first-out principles.

troubleshooting: Investigate any evidence of product or packaging degradation.

title: Shelf Life and Product Stability
summary: Understanding product stability and shelf-life considerations.
purpose: To ensure products are stored and distributed appropriately.

steps.title: Understand Shelf Life
steps.body: Shelf life refers to the period a product remains within specification.

steps.title: Monitor Packaging Integrity
steps.body: Closures, labels and containers must remain fit for purpose.

steps.title: Protect Product Quality
steps.body: Store products under recommended conditions.

steps.title: Maintain Traceability
steps.body: Retain batch identification throughout distribution.

steps.title: Investigate Complaints
steps.body: Review retained samples where quality concerns arise.

troubleshooting: Escalate stability concerns to Quality Assurance.

title: Patented Distillation Process Overview
summary: High-level overview of Via Nova's proprietary production technology.
purpose: To provide staff with an approved description of proprietary technology.
safety_notes: Confidential information must not be disclosed externally.

steps.title: Understand Confidentiality
steps.body: The process contains intellectual property owned by Via Nova.

steps.title: Understand the Objective
steps.body: The technology aims to improve flavour extraction and production efficiency.

steps.title: Understand Operational Benefits
steps.body: The process supports quality, consistency and reduced waste.

steps.title: Use Approved Language Only
steps.body: Do not describe proprietary details beyond approved materials.
